/usr/bin/ar qc libcedar_graph.a CMakeFiles/cedar_graph.dir/src/graph/cedar_graph.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_graph.dir/src/graph/cedar_graph_temporal.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_graph.dir/src/graph/graph_semantic_layer.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_graph.dir/src/graph/pushdown_predicate.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcedar_graph.a
